topic: On this day (1994): Brazil win their fourth World Cup title, defeating Italy 3–2 on penalties.
title: Baggio ka Insane Penalty Miss Jisne Desh Rulaya! 😭
cta: Was Baggio's miss the most heartbreaking moment in football history?

segments.voice_en: One missed penalty decided the 1994 World Cup after ninety thousand fans watched a brutal goalless war.
segments.image_query: 1994 World Cup final Rose Bowl stadium crowd

segments.voice_en: Players collapsed in the 100-degree California heat because FIFA scheduled the match for midday television.
segments.image_query: Brazil national football team 1994

segments.voice_en: It was the first shootout in final history, so Italy trusted their superstar Roberto Baggio to score.
segments.image_query: Roberto Baggio Italy 1994 World Cup

segments.voice_en: Brazil celebrated when Baggio blasted his shot over the crossbar to end the dramatic final.
segments.image_query: Roberto Baggio missed penalty 1994

segments.voice_en: Brazil lifted the cup for Ayrton Senna, but Baggio remained frozen in that one painful moment.
segments.image_query: Brazil national football team Ayrton Senna banner 1994
